prestazioni: Engine swap to a **EN07X** (supercharged 660cc Kei-car engine) with a **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (8.5 psi boost, 120+ hp) paired with a **Toda Racing EN07 forged piston set** (12.5:1 compression) and **Tomei 264° camshafts** for high-RPM power delivery
Full **Spoon Sports EN07X-specific exhaust system** (4-2-1 header, 60mm titanium muffler) with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise supercharger mapping
Custom **Haltech Elite 1500 ECU** with **Subaru R2-specific CAN bus integration**, supporting **ID1000 injectors** and a **Nismo S-Tune oil cooler** to prevent heat soak in Kei-car constraints
estetica: **C-West R2 Type-R widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, extended 30mm per side) with **Volk Racing TE37SL 15x7 +38 wheels** (185/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires) for aggressive stance
**Seibon Carbon R2-specific hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) paired with a **Varis R2 rear diffuser** (dual exhaust cutouts, 3D-printed ABS construction)
**Recaro SRD Kei-car seats** (fixed-back, carbon shell) wrapped in **Alcantara with red stitching** and a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) for JDM Kei-car ergonomics
